title: 目標達成の後に・邁進！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has been steadily building up
her strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a stayer, her mind is set on winning two
particular races in her classic year: the Kikuka Sho
and its prelude, the Kobe Shimbun Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She proclaims her desire to keep in good form
and remain focused through her progress forward.
